allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: prevent auth flash on page reload using router context

- Implement TanStack Router context pattern for auth state
- Add RouterContext interface to __root.tsx with auth state
- Pass auth state from App.tsx to RouterProvider via context
- Update route guards to use context.auth instead of direct token checks
- Remove setTimeout hacks from beforeLoad guards
- Force sync localStorage with atoms in checkAuthAtom to ensure hydration
- Add debug logging for localStorage and atom state during auth check

This eliminates race conditions between auth initialization and route
evaluation, following TanStack Router''s recommended authentication pattern.
EOF
)")
